description: A plain candid color photograph with no on-image slogans, captions, or graphic overlays. The scene is an interior wood-paneled government office. In the foreground a woman reads from a sheet of paper; she wears a tan blouse and a white safety hard hat marked 'MSHA' fitted with a head-mounted RealWear-style camera/AR device over her eyeglasses, suggesting a demonstration of AI/connected mine-safety technology. Behind her stand a younger man in a white shirt and an older man in a dark suit; a framed official portrait of President Trump hangs on the paneled wall, with leather chairs in the room. This is a documentary event photo (Mine Safety and Health Administration technology demonstration) rather than a designed meme or poster. It accompanies a tweet about MSHA using AI to strengthen miner safety.
